$doc: Cursor CLI delivery map. Guard = beforeShellExecution hook + guard-adapter shim, backed by a static Shell/Read deny list. hooks.json is symlinked whole-file; cli-config.json is merged (Cursor writes to it). No global CLI instruction file exists for Cursor — coverage is per-project AGENTS.md/CLAUDE.md, so no global symlink here. No documented Stop-event hook, so no council nudge; the council runs via the skill.

links.note: private-runtime launcher for the Cursor guard adapter
BIN for the council skill on Cursor host

machineLocal.note: native=cursor-agent --mode plan (host model, usually Grok) + external roster minus xAI
